title: Chiseled Bookshelf 3D
body:
Resourcepack that makes Chiseled Bookshelf 3D
![bookshelves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e8d9788c782e422c3e33712427bd91a2b39db15.png)

This resource pack supports Universal Shelf mod that allows Chiseled Bookshelf to store any item: [https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-shelf](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-shelf)
